response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-04:30 is a merchandise presentation (non-vocal). 04:30-05:05 is a vocal performance. 2. Identified song 'Gira Gira' at 04:39 from on-screen text 'Lyrics, Music: てにをは'. 3. Searched for 'ギラギラ てにをは lyrics'. 4. Found the official Japanese lyrics. 5. Generated the JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Ouro Kronii presenting merchandise followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Gira Gira' by Teniwoha.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii presents various merchandise items. No vocal performance is occurring, just background music.
Ouro Kronii performs a vocal cover of 'Gira Gira'. The text 'ギラギラ' and 'Lyrics, Music: てにをは' appears on screen.

今に見てろこのluv

Drag on Drag on

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, yet another wonderful world
Today, too, I am bewildered by my own ugliness
But the feelings of wanting to like someone
Are just as good as anyone else's, so I'm writhing, aren't I?
Ugly, to tell you the truth, my face
Looks like it was drawn by God with his left hand
Inevitably, not one of the love songs in this world
Is meant for someone like me, right?
I take my fill of kisses and pity that have no use
And protect myself with scabs of sequins
I don't care if I'm not loved
Glittering and shining, I swallow the night
Rap Tap Tap Tap
Just you wait, this love
What stings in my eyes is 1mg of fireworks
Drag on Drag on
How funny, this world is bizarre
Gira Gira Gira
Unknown, before even Buddha knows it
It seems I was already healthy and crazy
Is that on the world's side, or is it on mine?
Coexistence is impossible from the start
Imitations are sad
Desperate, running, running
Before the strong acid rain washes it away
Embracing my fluorescent bruises
Blazing, spewing fire, I am the wolf of the night
Rap Tap Tap Tap
Just you wait there, this dance
Get stronger, with your own armed makeup
Flap up Flap up
Suddenly anxious, loneliness is fuel (gasoline)
Going through the cynical town
Close your eyes
Are you ready yet? Are you ready yet?
If only God were left-handed, I wonder how happy I would be
Glittering and shining, I swallow the night
Rap Tap Tap Tap
Just you wait, this love
What stings in my eyes is 1mg of fireworks
Drag on Drag on
How funny, this world is bizarre
Gira Gira Gira
Glittering Give Love
Flowers are full, I can't stay as I am
Everyone, everything
What a wonderful world it is!
Let's glitter on.
